services_supported: Repair and maintenance services for in-ground pools

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: If Mark and Dave don't answer, Clara will pull the customer back, tell them an urgent page has been sent, and fire a critical SMS to both Mark and Denise.

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Clara will take 100% of the calls and schedule them for the next available time slot.

integration_constraints: Skimmer API integration for routing and scheduling. Clara will push leads to Skimmer via API as "Leads" and create a "To-Do" task for the assigned tech.
after_hours_flow_summary: Clara will take 100% of the calls and schedule them for the next available time slot.
